indicators.name: Hard flooring
indicators.rationale: Hard flooring is not suitable for yoga as it can cause injuries.

indicators.name: No windows
indicators.rationale: No natural light makes it difficult to perform yoga.

indicators.name: No mats
indicators.rationale: No yoga mats make it impossible to perform yoga.

reasoning_summary: The space is not suitable for yoga due to hard flooring, lack of natural light, and absence of yoga mats.
